description_long: This is a large, detached residential house set within a fenced lot, featuring a main two-story structure with a dark, multi-gabled roof and a prominent front porch supported by white columns. The house is constructed primarily of reddish-brown brick with white trim around the windows and doors, and it is surrounded by a manicured lawn and a row of tall, evenly spaced trees along the property boundaries. A paved driveway leads from the street to the house, curving past a secondary outbuilding or garage located at the rear of the lot. The windows are symmetrically arranged, with dormer windows on the upper floor and large rectangular windows on the ground floor. The property is enclosed by a low fence with a gate at the front, and the landscaping includes hedges and paved walkways. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional and suburban architectural elements, with a focus on symmetry and curb appeal.
description: A large, brick two-story house with a dark gabled roof, white-trimmed windows, and a front porch, set within a fenced, landscaped lot with a driveway and secondary outbuilding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a porch, white columns, and a gated fence, flanked by rows of trees and a driveway leading to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the main house's brick facade, the driveway, and the secondary outbuilding at the rear of the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, the secondary structure, and the fenced backyard area with paved surfaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the house, the garage/outbuilding, and the full extent of the fenced lot and landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front porch with white columns, steps, a double door, and a decorative overhang
